## remarkRelativeCodePathsAdjustment() function

This Remark plugin helps to adjust code meta `file`<!-- -->, ensuring paths remain accurate even after file relocations or inclusions.

When `processor.data().filePathChanges` is set, this plugin adjusts all relative paths for code to ensure they are accurate.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function remarkRelativeCodePathsAdjustment(this: Processor): Transformer;
```
